data.name: My Succubus Visitor
data.detailed_description:
You were supposed to be enjoying a quiet, easy gig—house-sitting your uncle's suburban home. Instead, after hearing a strange noise, you find yourself staring at a mysterious, half-dressed succubus who needs one thing to survive: you.

​This 3D first-person experience offers a brief but impactful 20-minute playtime. Drawing inspiration from the narrative depth of visual novels, it blends that storytelling with first-person interaction, letting you explore the environment and engage with the NPC, Suz.

You play as Will, an average guy watching his uncle's house for the week, expecting nothing but peace. The story begins with a strange interruption: the lights flicker, an intense noise sounds, and a mysterious girl named Suz suddenly materializes in the kitchen, disheveling the furniture.

​Your primary goal is to uncover the truth about Suz and, ultimately, to satisfy her bizarre—and carnal—assignment.

Solve minor puzzles like restoring the water to the non-functional shower and searching for items like a yoga book or alcohol to help Suz relax. These actions facilitate the core narrative progression.

Accelerate your relationship with Suz from confusion to a full-blown sexual encounter in a single night.

data.short_description: House-sitting gets explicit. A succubus needs your semen to survive. Help her relax and fulfill her needs in this Fully Animated 3D Dating Sim.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8.1/10 (64-bit versions)
  • 處理器: Intel® i5-4590 or AMD FX 8350 or better
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce® GTX 970 or AMD Radeon™ R9 290 equivalent or better
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
